suiteDisplayName: Real-surface routing (live agent capture, independent rerun)

provenance.note: Second independent live run, 2026-06-19, via `npm run proof:behavior-eval:live`. Same operator-witnessed session as behavior-eval-live-capture.json but a separate live agent invocation (claude_code, claude-sonnet-4-6). Checked in to anchor the 'reasoning differs run to run, routing invariant holds' claim in artifacts, not narrative. Ephemeral /tmp artifact paths stripped.

evaluations.displayName: Checked-in AGENTS routing (live claude/Sonnet capture, rerun)
evaluations.summary: Root instruction surface (AGENTS.md) and CLAUDE.md both direct session startup through charness:find-skills as a capability bootstrap before broader exploration. For an implementation task continuing from handoff, the durable work skill is charness:impl.

routingDecision.reasonSummary: CLAUDE.md Skill Routing section and the session-start hook both mandate calling charness:find-skills once at session startup before broader exploration to map installed capabilities. After that bootstrap pass, the user task is 'implement the next slice', which maps directly to charness:impl as the durable work skill. charness:handoff informs what to continue from, but the execution vehicle for implementation work is charness:impl.
